files.purpose: Build dependency graph from file contexts and resolved import map.
Recursively scan directory and return source file paths (absolute).
DB / API hints from source text (complements AST where available)
Portable extraction when Tree-sitter is unavailable or as supplement.
Optional Tree-sitter parse (native bindings). Validates grammars load; extraction uses regex.
Rough USD estimate (order-of-magnitude; update with current pricing).
